title: Telegram notifier configuration
description: Delivers a Notification via the Telegram Bot sendMessage API to a chat.

bot_token.title: Bot token
bot_token.description: Telegram bot token (a secret; UI password field, vault-encrypted at rest). Rides in the request URL path and is never logged.

chat_id.title: Chat ID
chat_id.description: Target chat/channel id the message is delivered to.
